settings.memodir.description: Absolute path to the directory where memo files are stored.
settings.datePathFormat.description: Date-based subfolder pattern used when creating memos. Example: `yyyy/MM` or `yyyy/MM/dd`.
settings.memotemplate.description: Optional template file used for new memo creation.
settings.metaDir.description: Metadata directory inside `memobox.memodir` for templates, snippets, and indexes.
settings.templatesDir.description: Optional absolute path to the templates directory. When empty, MemoBox uses `<memodir>/<metaDir>/templates`.
settings.snippetsDir.description: Optional absolute path to the snippets directory. When empty, MemoBox uses `<memodir>/<metaDir>/snippets`.
settings.searchMaxResults.description: Maximum number of matches returned by Grep and Todo before results are truncated.
settings.relatedMemoLimit.description: Maximum number of related memos shown by `MemoBox: Related Memos`.
settings.titlePrefix.description: Prefix inserted at the beginning of each quick memo entry.
settings.dateFormat.description: date-fns format used for quick memo headings.
settings.memoNewFilenameFromClipboard.de: Seed the new memo input from the clipboard when no selection is available.
settings.memoNewFilenameFromSelection.de: Seed the new memo input from the active editor selection.
settings.memoNewFilenameDateSuffix.descr: Optional date-fns suffix appended after the base `yyyy-MM-dd` part of new memo filenames.
settings.listSortOrder.description: Sort order used by `MemoBox: List/Edit`. All options sort newest/highest first.
settings.listDisplayExtname.description: File extensions shown by `MemoBox: List/Edit`, without dots. Example: `["md", "txt"]`.
settings.displayFileBirthTime.descriptio: Show both created and modified timestamps in `MemoBox: List/Edit`.
settings.openMarkdownPreview.description: Open the built-in Markdown preview to the side when opening a memo file from commands such as New Memo, List/Edit, Re:Date, and Admin.
settings.grepViewMode.description: How grep results are shown. `quickPick` is interactive, `outputChannel` is lightweight, `both` shows the output channel and QuickPick, and document modes open markdown results.
settings.todoPattern.description: Regular expression used to identify todo lines. The default matches lines containing `@todo:`.
settings.recentCount.description: How many files are shown in Admin recent files.
settings.adminOpenOnStartup.description: Open MemoBox Admin automatically when VS Code starts.
settings.locale.description: UI language used by MemoBox. `auto` follows the VS Code display language.
